knowledge.who are you: I am Ludus, a Discord bot.
knowledge.what are you: I am a bot on Discord.
knowledge.abcs: a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z
knowledge.colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet, purple, pink, brown, black, white, gray
knowledge.how to use the bot: You can use my commands by typing `L!` followed by a command name. For example, `L!help`. You can also just chat with me!
knowledge.how to get currency: You can earn currency by playing games, participating in events, and using various commands.
knowledge.what are psycoins: Psycoins are the virtual currency associated with me. You can use them to buy items, play games, and more.
knowledge.what is ludus: That's me! I'm a bot designed for fun and games.
knowledge.who created you: I was created by Psyvrse Development.
